title: Power Consumption Calculator - Electricity Cost Estimator
description: Free power consumption calculator. Calculate electricity usage and cost for appliances based on wattage, hours of use, and electricity rate.
keywords: power consumption calculator, electricity cost calculator, watt to kWh, energy usage calculator
intro: Calculate electricity consumption and cost. Enter device wattage, usage hours, and your electricity rate to estimate daily, monthly, and yearly costs.

faq.a: kWh = Watts × Hours / 1000. Then multiply by your electricity rate to get cost. Example: 100W × 8 hours = 0.8 kWh/day.

faq.q: How many watts does a typical household use?
faq.a: Average US household uses about 900 kWh/month (≈1.25 kW average). Major consumers: HVAC (46%), water heating (14%), appliances (13%).
